Overview.content: The event system is a synchronous, in-process multicast pub/sub bus. Every significant occurrence — node lifecycle, LLM call start/complete, interrupts, artifacts, streaming tokens, worktree changes — is published as a typed `Events.GraphEvent` subtype. All listeners receive every event in `order()` priority sequence. There is no asynchronous dispatch, no queue, and no separate thread; the thread that calls `eventBus.publish()` executes each listener's `onEvent()` call sequentially before `publish()` returns.

DefaultEventBus: The Synchronous Fan-Out.content:
`DefaultEventBus` is a Spring `@Service`. All `EventListener` beans are auto-injected via `@Autowired @Lazy List<EventListener>` — no explicit registration needed. The subscriber list is sorted by `order()` on each `subscribe()` call.

`publish(GraphEvent)` iterates a snapshot copy of the subscriber list, filters by `listener.isInterestedIn(event)`, and calls `onEvent(event)`. Per-listener exceptions are caught and logged — other listeners always receive the event even if one throws.

`EventBus.Process` is an `InheritableThreadLocal<AgentNodeKey>` that carries the current executing node's ID into nested threads, enabling event correlation without explicit parameter passing.

The Subscriber Table.content:
| Listener | Order | Interest | Purpose |
|---|---|---|---|
| `SaveGraphEventToGraphRepositoryListener` | `MIN_VALUE` | NODE_ADDED, ADD_CHILD_NODE, NODE_UPDATED, NODE_DELETED, NODE_STATUS_CHANGED | Persists node state to `GraphRepository` **first**, before anything reads it |
| `InterruptRequestEventListener` | 0 | INTERRUPT_REQUEST_EVENT only | Validates target node is RUNNING, composes interrupt message, re-publishes ADD_MESSAGE_EVENT + INTERRUPT_STATUS |
| `AgentEventListener` | 0 | all | Orchestration brain: routes NodeAdded → AgentRunner to start agents; AddMessage → inject into live agent; NodeStatusChanged, ReviewRequested, Stop, Pause → agent lifecycle control |
| `ArtifactEventListener` | 0 | most (except TUI/mode/status-changed) | Builds and persists the artifact tree from emitted artifacts, stream deltas, and semantic graph events |
| `SaveEventToEventRepositoryListener` | 0 | all | Appends every event to `EventStreamRepository` (enables SSE catch-up replay) |
| `SseEventAdapter` | 0 | all | Serializes events via `AgUiSerdes`, applies controller/path filters per emitter, pushes to all SSE connections |
| `WebSocketEventAdapter` | 0 | all | Serializes events, pushes to all open WebSocket sessions |
| `BlackboardHistory` (per-agent, dynamic) | variable | agent-scoped | Per-agent-process event history; subscribed on first ActionStartedEvent, unsubscribed on terminal routing |

Event Type Taxonomy.content:
The complete `Events.GraphEvent` sealed hierarchy:

**Node lifecycle**: NODE_ADDED, ADD_CHILD_NODE, NODE_UPDATED, NODE_DELETED, NODE_STATUS_CHANGED, NODE_BRANCHED, NODE_PRUNED, NODE_ERROR, NODE_STREAM_DELTA, NODE_THOUGHT_DELTA, NODE_REVIEW_REQUESTED, NODE_BRANCH_REQUESTED

**Goal lifecycle**: GOAL_STARTED, GOAL_COMPLETED

**Worktree lifecycle**: WORKTREE_CREATED, WORKTREE_BRANCHED, WORKTREE_MERGED, WORKTREE_DISCARDED

**Merge lifecycle**: MERGE_PHASE_STARTED, MERGE_PHASE_COMPLETED

**Agent execution**: ACTION_STARTED, ACTION_COMPLETED, AGENT_EXECUTOR_START, AGENT_EXECUTOR_COMPLETE, PROMPT_RECEIVED

**Agent calls**: AGENT_CALL_STARTED, AGENT_CALL_COMPLETED, AGENT_CALL (RETURNED type for controller responses)

**Retry/error observability**: NULL_RESULT, INCOMPLETE_JSON, UNPARSED_TOOL_CALL, TIMEOUT, PARSE_ERROR, COMPACTION

**Interrupt/control**: INTERRUPT_REQUEST_EVENT, INTERRUPT_STATUS, RESOLVE_INTERRUPT, STOP_AGENT, PAUSE_EVENT, RESUME_EVENT, ADD_MESSAGE_EVENT

**Chat sessions**: CHAT_SESSION_CREATED, CHAT_SESSION_CLOSED, CHAT_SESSION_RESET

**UI/TUI**: GUI_RENDER, UI_DIFF_APPLIED, UI_DIFF_REJECTED, UI_DIFF_REVERTED, UI_FEEDBACK, USER_MESSAGE_CHUNK, CURRENT_MODE_UPDATE, AVAILABLE_COMMANDS_UPDATE, PLAN_UPDATE, TUI_INTERACTION, TUI_SYSTEM

**Permissions**: PERMISSION_REQUESTED, PERMISSION_RESOLVED

**Data layer**: AI_FILTER_SESSION, PROPAGATION, TRANSFORMATION, ARTIFACT_EMITTED

The Canonical Event Flow.content:
```
Agent code / REST controller / Embabel framework
 │
 │ eventBus.publish(event)
 ▼
DefaultEventBus (synchronous, ordered fan-out)
 │
 ├──[MIN_VALUE] SaveGraphEventToGraphRepositoryListener
 │                → GraphRepository (in-memory ConcurrentHashMap<nodeId, GraphNode>)
 │
 ├──[0] InterruptRequestEventListener
 │        (only INTERRUPT_REQUEST_EVENT)
 │        → validates node RUNNING, re-publishes ADD_MESSAGE_EVENT + INTERRUPT_STATUS
 │
 ├──[0] AgentEventListener
 │        → AgentRunner → AgentLifecycleHandler → AgentPlatform (start/drive agents)
 │
 ├──[0] ArtifactEventListener
 │        → ArtifactTreeBuilder → ArtifactService (persistent artifact trees)
 │
 ├──[0] SaveEventToEventRepositoryListener
 │        → EventStreamRepository (in-memory replay store for SSE catch-up)
 │
 ├──[0] SseEventAdapter
 │        → filter pipeline (object + JSON-path per emitter)
 │        → all registered SseEmitter HTTP connections
 │
 └──[0] WebSocketEventAdapter
          → filter pipeline (object + JSON-path global)
          → all connected WebSocket sessions
```

AgentRunner: Event-to-Agent Bridge.content:
`AgentRunner` is called exclusively from `AgentEventListener` — never from REST endpoints. It dispatches on event type:

- **NodeAddedEvent** → `maybeRunWorkflow()`: only acts if node is `OrchestratorNode` in READY status. Checks the `AgentProcess` state and only launches if absent or non-RUNNING. Delegates to `AgentLifecycleHandler.runAgent()` → `agentPlatform.runAgentFrom()` (blocks until workflow completes).

- **AddMessageEvent** → `addMessageToAgent()`: sends the message content to the live `AgentProcess` via `OutputChannel.send(MessageOutputChannelEvent)`. This injects interrupt responses, user messages, and resume content into an already-running agent's conversation.

SSE vs WebSocket.content:
| Dimension | SseEventAdapter | WebSocketEventAdapter |
|---|---|---|
| Transport | HTTP/1.1 SSE (`text/event-stream`) via `SseEmitter` | WebSocket full-duplex via `WebSocketSession` |
| Per-client filtering | Each `RegisteredEmitter` carries a `Predicate<GraphEvent>` and `controllerId` | No per-client predicate; every session receives every event |
| Catch-up replay | On registration, replays all events from `EventStreamRepository` | No catch-up; client only receives events after connection |
| Event framing | SSE events named `"ag-ui"` | Raw `TextMessage` with JSON payload |

Read-Back Loops.content:
The only circular dependencies:

1. `InterruptRequestEventListener` receives INTERRUPT_REQUEST_EVENT and re-publishes ADD_MESSAGE_EVENT + INTERRUPT_STATUS — deliberate re-publish chain
2. `AgentEventListener` receives NODE_ERROR from agent failure and may re-publish NODE_ERROR — error propagation
3. `SseEventAdapter.registerEmitter()` reads from `EventStreamRepository` (populated by `SaveEventToEventRepositoryListener`) for catch-up replay

No listener produces events that trigger itself — the re-publish chains are always to different event types.
